projectTitle_es: Consultoría Digital y Resolución de Problemas

downloadCta.headline: Ready to move forward?
downloadCta.subtitle: This is what working with ZNAS looks like in practice. The full proposal is below.

summary.headline: Haven has 20 years of work behind it. This proposal is about what gets built around it next.
summary.body: You've put two decades into Haven. The digital side hasn't kept pace. Four suspended Google Business Profiles are the most visible problem — but they're not the only one. ZNAS comes in as your technology partner: we identify what's broken, propose what needs to change, and execute only after you approve. You stay in control of every decision.

howItWorks.intro: José runs this engagement directly — you'll always be working with him, not handed off to a team. From week one, the focus is recovering the suspended profiles and mapping whatever else is holding Haven back. Scope and pricing are set together in the alignment meeting, before anything starts.

cards.title: Month-to-month
cards.body: No long-term lock-in. Pause or end the engagement with 15 days' notice — no penalties.

cards.title: You approve every move
cards.body: ZNAS recommends; you decide. Nothing is executed without your sign-off first.

cards.title: Three phases, clear exits
cards.body: Assessment, Transformation Proposal, Execution. Each phase ends with a deliverable you review before the next one begins.

team.name: José Sanz
team.tagline: 17+ years building production-scale systems across enterprise environments. Founder of ZNAS LLC and co-founder of Visionarys. Previously a lead engineer at a large-scale enterprise language services platform, driving technical architecture across a five-year tenure. Holds an MIT Certification in AI Business Strategy and has presented on AI adoption at a developer-focused workshop series.
team.caption: José leads every engagement directly. Clients work with him, not a team that reports to him.

members.name: María José Zepeda
members.tagline: Leads operations at Visionarys and supports ZNAS engagements on the coordination and client-facing side. Keeps projects organized, communication clear, and deliverables on schedule.
members.caption: Majo makes sure nothing falls through the cracks — handling the day-to-day coordination that lets José focus on the work itself.

members.name: Jesús Mendivil
members.tagline: Handles technical execution across ZNAS engagements. Works across cloud infrastructure, IT administration, and AI tooling — building and maintaining the systems that keep operations running.
members.caption: Jesús is the person who makes things work. From GCP deployments to device management and automation, he takes ownership of the technical side so engagements don't stall.

initiative.headline: The work starts before you sign.
initiative.body:
The gameplan below was drafted before this meeting. It covers exactly how ZNAS would recover your four suspended Google Business Profiles — what starts this week without needing any access from you, what we'll need your side to unblock, and the one step only you can take: a single 60-second on-camera verification that mirrors a documented reinstatement from a peer business.

Every task is assigned. Every dependency is mapped. The appeal sequence is structured so nothing wastes one of Google's limited review windows.

Have a look before our meeting so we can spend that time on your questions and any adjustments.

realEstateAgent.headline: The real estate agent is already in build.
realEstateAgent.intro: You mentioned it in our first conversation: property research and bidding takes too long. Finding listings that actually fit your criteria, running the numbers, deciding fast enough to move on a deal — it burns time Haven doesn't have to waste. ZNAS and Visionarys are already building the agent that handles this for you.

points.title: Live market data
points.body: Zillow integration pulls current listings, pricing, and comparable sales automatically — no manual searching required.

points.title: Trained on how you think
points.body: The agent learns your criteria: how you pick targets, how you weigh trade-offs, and what makes a property worth moving on.

points.title: Time back in your week
points.body: Research and comparison happen in seconds, not afternoons — so you spend your time on the calls and decisions only you can make.

realEstateAgent.note: The agent runs on CoPresent — an AI platform built by Visionarys. Haven licenses it directly from Visionarys; everything built on top of it is yours.
